sections.paragraph:
Original: זקק

Transliteration: zâqaq

Phonetic: zaw-kak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to purify, distil, strain, refine
    1. (Qal)
      1. to purify, distil, strain
      2. to refine
    2. (Piel) to purge, refine
    3. (Pual) to refine, purify

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 576

Part(s) of speech: Verb
